title: Business Plan: Atlas Games (Pty) Ltd
summary: This business plan outlines the commercial strategy for Atlas Games (Pty) Ltd, a South African impact-first indie game studio developing culturally localised, curriculum-aligned serious games for health education. Its founding product, Cancer Crusher, was created in partnership with Love Your Nuts, a Section 18A NPO focused on testicular cancer awareness among adolescents. The studio operates a hybrid B2B revenue model with six income streams including impact services, library licensing, corporate CSR sponsorship, support SLAs, teacher training, and non-dilutive grant funding, with Year 1 projected revenue of R1,200,000. The growth strategy is phased across six years, scaling from a provincial pilot to multi-region rollouts, teacher dashboards, channel partnerships, and pan-African NGO collaboration by Year 6. The plan identifies eight key risks with pre-committed mitigation strategies and quarterly KPI reviews covering commercial performance, product stability, and measurable learning impact.
